SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AppConfig
Handles application configuration loading and folder initialization.
BatchProcessor
Orchestrates the overall CSV-to-JSON batch processing workflow.
Constants
Shared constants across the application.
CsvJsonApplication
Main application class and entry point.
CsvParseException
Exception thrown when CSV parsing or validation fails.
CsvParserService
Service to parse CSV files into a dynamic List of Maps representing rows.
FileMetadata
Represents the metadata associated with a file processed by the application.
FileScannerService
Service responsible for scanning the file system directories for CSV files.
FileUtils
Utility functions for file system operations.
JsonWriterService
Service to write dynamic data structures (List of Maps) as formatted JSON files.
LogService
Manages the application execution log (execution.log) and processing results (results.csv).
MetadataService
Manages the processed-files.csv ledger to check file status and update execution states.
ProcessingResult
Represents the processing outcome of an individual file.
RetryService
Service responsible for retrying failed CSV file conversions.
